note: Only skill1 needs an override; the parser's skill2 (Full-Burst ammo +60% / full reload) and burst (ATK +115.12%, Charge Dmg +150.12% for 10s) are already faithful and are left to the parser. S1 procs on a cycling full-charge counter: every 3rd full charge = 250.47% single-target, every 6th = 500% distributed, every 9th = 750.47% distributed (phases don't stack, counter loops). Her burst changes the required counts to 1/2/3 for 10s, tripling the proc rate during the burst window (this is the unparsed burst line, folded in here). Modeled as steady-state throughput: with ~25% burst uptime (10s of a 40s cooldown) and a roughly constant full-charge cadence, one full proc-set (250.47 + 500 + 750.47) lands per 9 shots outside burst and per 3 shots inside, which blends to one set per 6 shots on average -> a single hitCount:6 block firing all three procs (hitsPerShot=1 so hits==shots). The 250.47% hits one enemy as plain damage (no distributed flavor); the 500% and 750.47% are distributed (full value vs the single boss). Uncertainty: blending smears the burst-clustered, ATK/charge-amplified procs evenly across the battle, so procs landing in the amplified burst window are undercounted somewhat; the alternative literal reading (hitCount:9, ignoring the burst threshold cut) would undercount more. U1-class (2026-07-13): her S1 proc set joins the exempt class (noFb; range exemption is now universal for riders) — she was the original x0.59-fit unit; with projExpl-on-RL-normals her normals warmed and the procs needed the class treatment.
